objective: Fail closed on TenantService.getTenant when the requested tenant ID does not match TenantContext.
rollbackNotes: Preserve unrelated user changes; revert only this checkpoint scope if explicitly approved.
validationRun: .\mvnw.cmd -pl services/foundation-service -am test passed with 112 foundation-service tests and upstream shared-module tests.
git diff --check for touched tenant service/test/checkpoint files passed with CRLF warnings only.
outcome: TenantService.getTenant now requires the requested tenant ID to match TenantContext before repository lookup, hiding cross-tenant IDs and failing closed when tenant context is missing.
residualRisks: Tenant list, get-by-slug, and lifecycle mutation policy still need a platform-admin versus self-tenant decision.
Production release remains blocked by target-environment evidence and strict release gates.
nextAction: Record completion in backlog/memory/handoff, release leases, then reassess remaining safe foundation-service work.
